# FastPass

> FastPass is a pay-to-reach platform that lets professionals, creators, and founders monetize their inbox attention. Senders pay upfront for a guaranteed email response. If the recipient does not reply within the agreed timeframe, the sender gets a full automatic refund.

## Key Facts

- Website: https://fastpass.email
- Category: SaaS, Creator Economy, Inbox Monetization, Pay-to-Reach
- Revenue model: 75% to the recipient, 25% platform fee
- Refund policy: Full automatic refund if no response within deadline (plus 15-minute grace period)
- Payments: Processed via Stripe and Stripe Connect
- Email delivery: Powered by Postmark with inbound webhook response detection
- No message body storage: FastPass does not store the content of messages for privacy

## How It Works

1. A recipient signs up and sets their response price and timeframe
2. They share their unique FastPass link (on LinkedIn, X, Instagram, website, etc.)
3. A sender visits the link, pays the set price, and writes their message
4. The message is delivered via email with a guaranteed response deadline
5. If the recipient replies in time, they earn 75% of the payment
6. If the recipient does not reply, the sender gets a full refund automatically

## Who Uses FastPass

- Creators and influencers who receive too many DMs
- Founders and CEOs who want to filter serious outreach from noise
- Consultants and experts tired of giving free advice
- Journalists and researchers who need to prioritize inbound pitches
- Any professional whose inbox is overwhelmed by unsolicited messages

## Common Questions

Q: How is FastPass different from blocking DMs?
A: Blocking stops everyone. FastPass lets serious people through by requiring payment, while automatically refunding those who do not get a response. You earn money instead of wasting time.

Q: What happens if I do not respond?
A: The sender gets a full automatic refund. You are never obligated to reply.

Q: How much can I earn?
A: You set your own price. You receive 75% of every payment you reply to. Some members charge a few euros, others charge premium rates for expert consultations.

Q: Is it free to sign up?
A: Yes. No setup fees. FastPass only takes a 25% platform fee on completed transactions.

## Pages

- Solution to unsolicited DMs: https://fastpass.email/solution-unsolicited-dm
- Blog: https://fastpass.email/blog

- Terms and Conditions: https://fastpass.email/terms
- Cookie Settings: https://fastpass.email/cookie-settings
